{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Logistics Manager",
  "description": "Glowfield International School is an ingenious school that provides your child with a world-class educational experience.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Logistics Manager&nbsp;
Job Location: Lekki-Epe, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	Glowfield International School is seeking a highly organized and experienced Logistics Manager to oversee and coordinate the school&#39;s logistics operations.


Requirements


	First Degree in Logistics, Supply Chain Management, Business Administration or a related field.
	Minimum of 5-10 years of logistics experience preferably within a school or educational environment.
	Demonstrable experience in managing school logistics and transportation operations.
	Strong organizational, communication and problem-solving skills.
	Ability to work effectively under pressure and manage multiple tasks efficiently.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: hr@glowfieldschool.comusing &ldquo;Logistics Manager&rdquo; as the subject of the email.",

  },

Logistics Manager Job at Glowfield International School




        
    

        
        Glowfield International School is an ingenious school that provides your child with a world-class educational experience.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Logistics Manager 
Job Location: Lekki-Epe, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	Glowfield International School is seeking a highly organized and experienced Logistics Manager to oversee and coordinate the school's logistics operations.


Requirements
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	First Degree in Logistics, Supply Chain Management, Business Administration or a related field.
	Minimum of 5-10 years of logistics experience preferably within a school or educational environment.
	Demonstrable experience in managing school logistics and transportation operations.
	Strong organizational, communication and problem-solving skills.
	Ability to work effectively under pressure and manage multiple tasks efficiently.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected]using “Logistics Manager” as the subject of the email.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Executive Marketing Officer",
  "description": "UC Agency, a recruiting agency, is recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Executive Marketing Officer

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	A motivated and results-driven executive marketing officer to join our dynamic team! If you&#39;re passionate about real estate, driven by success, and love working with people, we want to hear from you.


Responsibilities


	Source and qualify potential buyers and sellers
	Conduct property viewings and showings
	Handle negotiations and close deals
	Develop and implement marketing strategies to attract clients
	Build and maintain relationships with clients and partners.


Requirements


	Minimum of 1 year of experience in real estate
	Strong communication and negotiation skills
	Self-motivated and target-driven
	Ability to work in a fast-paced environment.


What We Offer


	Salary: N100,000 - N500,000 / Month.&nbsp;
	Competitive commission structure
	Training and professional development
	Marketing support and resources
	Collaborative team environment.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their application to: ucjobagency@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Executive Marketing Officer Job at UC Agency




        
    

        
        UC Agency, a recruiting agency, is recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Executive Marketing Officer

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	A motivated and results-driven executive marketing officer to join our dynamic team! If you're passionate about real estate, driven by success, and love working with people, we want to hear from you.


Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Source and qualify potential buyers and sellers
	Conduct property viewings and showings
	Handle negotiations and close deals
	Develop and implement marketing strategies to attract clients
	Build and maintain relationships with clients and partners.


Requirements


	Minimum of 1 year of experience in real estate
	Strong communication and negotiation skills
	Self-motivated and target-driven
	Ability to work in a fast-paced environment.


What We Offer


	Salary: N100,000 - N500,000 / Month. 
	Competitive commission structure
	Training and professional development
	Marketing support and resources
	Collaborative team environment.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their application to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
